prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: BOVINE PURINE NUCLEOSIDE PHOSPHORYLASE COMPLEXED WITH INOSINE. Entity description: PURINE NUCLEOSIDE PHOSPHORYLASE. Entry keywords: PENTOSYLTRANSFERASE PENTOSYLTRANSFERASE, PURINE NUCLEOSIDE PHOSPHORYLASE. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.425532; mean_interface=0.269577; max_segment_membrane_density=0.8613; mean_disorder=0.183304. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 generic complex control source. generic_complex_only generic complex only; complex annotation alone is not biological_oligomer_context, not obligate assembly, and not assembly_required_core.
